texto: After lengthy consideration, my views have evolved sufficiently to support marriage equality legislation. This position doesn't require any religious denomination to alter any of its tenets; it simply forbids government from discrimination regarding who can marry whom.
explicacao: Citação de Tim Johnson sobre temas ligados a amor. “After lengthy consideration, my views have evolved sufficiently to support marriage equality legi…” articula amor, marriage, government em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como casamento e government.
